name: agentic-pipeline
description: Delegated project pipeline standardization for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Standardize project R&D loops with role agents.
interface.longDescription: Agentic Pipeline adds a Codex skill for turning ad hoc project work into an evidence-backed state machine with role ownership, validation gates, retained artifacts, and repeatable project guidance.
defaultPrompt: Audit project guidance and validation gates.
